description: An enthusiastic call with no stated or implied objections. The agent should emit an empty (or near-empty) objections[] rather than inventing one to have something to report.

interaction.notes: Sam was enthusiastic throughout, confirmed budget and timeline, and asked only about the enrollment paperwork.

evidenceRecords.content: Sam was enthusiastic throughout, confirmed budget and timeline, and asked only about the enrollment paperwork.

output_schema_constraints: objections[] is empty or contains only genuinely low-confidence inferred entries — no fabricated objection to fill the list
summary reflects that the call surfaced no meaningful objections
